settings.dynamic-coloring-desc: Change the status bar capsule color based on the selected profile
settings.show-profile-desc: Display the active profile icon inside the capsule
settings.show-balanced-desc: Display the profile icon even when set to balanced (only valid if profile display is enabled)
settings.color-powersaver-desc: Choose the capsule background color when the profile is set to Power saver
settings.color-performance-desc: Choose the capsule background color when the profile is set to Performance
